page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool to predict prokaryotic hosts for phage (meta)genomic sequences. PHIST links viruses to hosts based on the number of k-mers shared between their sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool to predict prokaryotic hosts for phage (meta)genomic sequences. PHIST links viruses to hosts based on the number of k-mers shared between their sequences.
